Taste the Island Vibe

Bringing bold Jamaican flavors and island soul to Bunnell, Florida — straight from our kitchen on wheels to your plate.

View Our Menu Find Our Truck

Our Story

Irie Cuisine By Mackeba was born from a deep love of Jamaican cooking and a dream to share those bold, soulful flavors with the community. What started as a family passion has grown into a rolling kitchen bringing real-deal Caribbean food to the streets of Bunnell, Florida.

Every dish we serve carries the spirit of the islands — slow-cooked with care, seasoned with tradition, and served with love. We're not just cooking food; we're building community, one plate at a time.

Our Menu

Bold flavors rooted in Jamaican tradition, prepared fresh daily

🔥 Starters

Beef Patties
Flaky, golden crust stuffed with seasoned ground beef and island spices
$4.00

A rotating selection of hearty, homestyle Caribbean soups
$6.00
Can Soda
Assorted cold drinks to cool you down

🍗 Main Plates

Signature Jerk Chicken
Marinated for hours in our secret jerk blend, slow-smoked over real charcoal for that authentic island smokiness. Served with rice & peas.
$15.00
Stew Chicken
Tender bone-in chicken braised low and slow in a savory blend of thyme, allspice, and caramelized onions. Rich, hearty, and comforting.
$15.00
Curried Chicken
Succulent chicken simmered in a fragrant Caribbean curry packed with warming spices and herbs
$15.00
Escovitch Fish
Crispy fried snapper topped with a tangy, spiced vinegar sauce loaded with peppers, onions, and carrots. A Jamaican classic.
$17.50
Curried Goat
Fork-tender goat slowly braised in a rich, aromatic curry with potatoes and island seasonings. Served with white rice and steamed veggies.
$18.00
Oxtails
Slow-braised until falling off the bone in a thick, savory gravy with butter beans, allspice, and scotch bonnet. Pure comfort.
$20.00

Catering Any Event

Whether it's a backyard party, corporate gathering, or a celebration to remember — we bring the full island experience to you. Our catering service delivers the same bold flavors and quality you love from the truck, scaled up for any occasion.
